pr.title: RHOAIENG-61570: [Connections tech-debt] Don't make new hidden connection on edit
pr.body:
When redeploying a model with a hidden connection type (e.g., OCI),
prefilledModelLocationData converts the connection from EXISTING to NEW
for UI display purposes. This caused handleConnectionCreation to create
a brand-new secret and delete the old one, even when nothing changed.

This fix adds an early return in handleConnectionCreation that detects
when the connection references an existing hidden secret (annotated with
opendatahub.io/connection-hidden). In that case it preserves the
existing secret, only patching the protocol annotation if needed,
instead of recreating it.

Closes [RHOAIENG-61570](https://redhat.atlassian.net/browse/RHOAIENG-61570)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Emily Samoylov <esamoylo@redhat.com>

<!-- This is an auto-generated comment: release notes by coderabbit.ai -->
## Summary by CodeRabbit

* **Bug Fixes**
  * Improved the model deployment wizard's handling of prefilled connections so they are correctly treated as new or existing based on connection visibility and ownership.
<!-- end of auto-generated comment: release notes by coderabbit.ai -->
